de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ArrayInitializer, ArrayLengthReference, ArrayReference, BranchImp, CatchAllStatement, CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration, CompilationUnit, ExecutionContext, ForUpdates, Guard, Import, InheritanceSpecification, JavaDeclaration, JavaStatement, LoopInit, MetaClassReference, MethodBodyStatement, MethodReference, Operator, PackageReference, PackageSpecification, ProgramTransformer, SpecialConstructorReference, SuperReference, ThisReference, Throws, TypeReferenceImp, VariableReference, VariableSpecification

    public abstract class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
extends JavaProgramElement
implements NonTerminalProgramElement
    Top level implementation of a Java NonTerminalProgramElement. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

      • getArrayPos

        protected int getArrayPos(ImmutableArray<ProgramElement> arr,
                          ProgramElement el)
        returns the index of element el in array arr
        Parameters:
        arr - the array where the element is looked for
        el - the element to look for
        Returns:
        the index of the element (-1 if not found)

        public boolean equalsModRenaming(SourceElement se,
                                 NameAbstractionTable nat)
        commented in interface SourceElement. Overwrites the default method implementation in ProgramElement by descending down to the children.

      • match

        public MatchConditions match(SourceData source,
                             MatchConditions matchCond)
        Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
        matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
        Specified by:
        match in interface ProgramElement
        Overrides:
        match in class JavaProgramElement
        Parameters:
        source - the SourceData with the program element to match
        matchCond - the MatchConditions found up to this point
        Returns:
        the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed

      • compatibleBlockSize

        protected boolean compatibleBlockSize(int pos,
                                      int max)
        used by @link matchChildren to decide if a found match is valid or if there are remaining source elements that have not been matched (in which case the match failed)

      • matchChildren

        protected MatchConditions matchChildren(SourceData source,
                                        MatchConditions matchCond,
                                        int offset)
        matches successively all children of this current node. Thereby the offset-th child is matched against source.getSource(). The call source.next has to be done in the @link ProgramElement#match method of the currently matched child in case of a successful match. This is not done here (rationale: schemavariables matching on lists can be implemented easy).
        Parameters:
        source - the SourceData with the children to be matched
        matchCond - the MatchConditions found so far
        offset - the int denoting the index of the child to start with
        Returns:
        the resulting match conditions or null if matching failed
